rule:today-endpoint-target-validation.rule: Validates target parameter accepts 60–600 minute range (inclusive), rejecting values outside bounds and non-numeric input.

rule:task-schedule-endpoint-validation.title: Task schedule endpoint date validation
rule:task-schedule-endpoint-validation.rule: Documents validation requirements for the /api/tasks/:id/schedule endpoint's date parameter. The endpoint must accept valid YYYY-MM-DD format dates, null values (to clear schedule), and reject invalid date formats, non-date strings, and numeric value

rule:today-view-component-structure.title: TodayView.tsx — source structure
rule:today-view-component-structure.rule: TodayView imports useToday hook, renders HeroTask and CapacityGauge components, committed and candidate queue sections, handles loading/error states. Sorts committed by PRI_RANK with done sinking, groups candidates by area in fixed order, never rende

rule:today-view-capacity-gauge-colors.title: CapacityGauge.tsx — zone colour logic (source analysis)
rule:today-view-capacity-gauge-colors.rule: CapacityGauge renders status-green for under-target, status-amber for 80–100%, and status-red for over-target zones. Guards against divide-by-zero, renders over-target hint, persists target to localStorage, and clamps fill to 100%.

rule:use-today-hook-structure.title: useToday hook implementation with TanStack Query and polling
rule:use-today-hook-structure.rule: Hook uses TanStack Query useQuery and useMutation for fetching and optimistic updates, sets staleTime to 15000ms and polls every 30 seconds; exports helper functions (scheduleForToday, removeFromToday, markDone, pauseTask, blockTask, cyclePriority);

rule:app-today-view-integration.title: App.tsx — TodayView integration
rule:app-today-view-integration.rule: App component must import and conditionally render TodayView when the current view is 'today', defaulting to today view via readStoredView. App must wire keyboard navigation (onVisibleIdsChange for TodayView, real visibleIds to useGlobalKeyboard), ac

rule:braindump-endpoint-validation.title: POST /api/capture/braindump endpoint validation
rule:braindump-endpoint-validation.rule: The POST /api/capture/braindump endpoint validates text input with a maximum of 10,000 characters, rejecting empty or whitespace-only text and missing text fields. The endpoint returns HTTP 200 always, even when the claude CLI is unavailable, by retu

rule:braindump-json-extraction-and-area-.title: braindump JSON extraction with area field fallback
rule:braindump-json-extraction-and-area-.rule: braindump extracts JSON arrays from plain or markdown-fenced LLM output, validates area field with fallback to 'internal' for unknown values, filters candidates without title.

rule:braindump-commit-endpoint-task-crea.title: POST /api/capture/commit
rule:braindump-commit-endpoint-task-crea.rule: Commit endpoint creates tasks from braindump candidates. Validates candidates array presence, skips entries without titles, falls back to GEN or first available project for unknown projects, returns 400 on missing candidates array, and returns empty

rule:acr-dispatch-endpoint-validation.title: POST /api/acr/dispatch validation and offline handling
rule:acr-dispatch-endpoint-validation.rule: POST /api/acr/dispatch always returns HTTP 200 with either jobId or error field, returns error when ACR offline, validates title present, never throws 5xx.

rule:artifacts-endpoint-list.title: GET /api/artifacts endpoint
rule:artifacts-endpoint-list.rule: API endpoint that returns a list of artifact records from artifacts.jsonl file, returning an empty array when the artifacts.jsonl file does not exist.

rule:artifacts-endpoint-processing.title: GET /api/artifacts data processing and sorting
rule:artifacts-endpoint-processing.rule: GET /api/artifacts deduplicates entries by path (retaining most recent created_at), filters out entries older than 30 days, computes staleDays correctly, sorts never-opened entries first (null last_opened_at), and gracefully skips malformed JSONL lin

rule:artifacts-opened-endpoint.title: POST /api/artifacts/opened endpoint
rule:artifacts-opened-endpoint.rule: API endpoint that marks an artifact as opened by updating last_opened_at timestamp, returning {ok: true} on success and HTTP 400 when the required path parameter is missing.

rule:artifacts-jsonl-append.title: Artifact JSONL file persistence
rule:artifacts-jsonl-append.rule: Appends artifact records to artifacts.jsonl file in JSONL format with graceful silent failure—operations on unwritable paths do not throw exceptions.

rule:acr-status-endpoint-online-behavior.title: GET /api/acr/status online response
rule:acr-status-endpoint-online-behavior.rule: GET /api/acr/status returns jobs array when ACR service is reachable, enabling live status monitoring in UI.

rule:acr-status-endpoint-offline-behavio.title: GET /api/acr/status offline graceful fallback
rule:acr-status-endpoint-offline-behavio.rule: GET /api/acr/status returns {offline: true, jobs: []} with HTTP 200 when ACR is unreachable, enabling graceful degradation without error responses.

rule:brain-search-endpoint-online.title: GET /api/brain/search — online path
rule:brain-search-endpoint-online.rule: Brain search online path returns a results array when the brain MCP server responds successfully. Implements the happy path for semantic search queries against the knowledge base.

rule:brain-search-endpoint-offline.title: GET /api/brain/search — offline path
rule:brain-search-endpoint-offline.rule: Brain search endpoint returns { offline: true, results: [] } with HTTP 200 when brain MCP server is unreachable.

rule:brain-search-endpoint-validation.title: GET /api/brain/search — validation
rule:brain-search-endpoint-validation.rule: Brain search endpoint validates the 'q' query parameter. Returns 400 when q param is missing or empty, enforcing non-empty search query constraint.

rule:format-elapsed-time.title: lib/format.ts — fmtElapsed
rule:format-elapsed-time.rule: fmtElapsed formats elapsed time as M:SS for under one hour, H:MM:SS for over one hour. Used for live timer display in HeroTask component.

rule:hero-task-component-structure.title: HeroTask.tsx — source structure
rule:hero-task-component-structure.rule: HeroTask component has null task empty state, renders live elapsed timer derived from transitions, never truncates title, shows Mark done/Pause/Block/Open detail actions, displays why in left-bordered block, includes pulsing eyebrow indicator, shows

rule:task-card-component-structure.title: TaskCard.tsx — source structure
rule:task-card-component-structure.rule: TaskCard uses StatusDot atom, renders 2px left priority bar, supports candidate mode with + button, shows selected state with surface-2 ring, has area hover chip expand for area labels.

rule:task-panel-width-modes.title: TaskPanel.tsx — structure.AC1 — width driven by panel.mode
rule:task-panel-width-modes.rule: TaskPanel defines 380px width for peek mode and 440px for detail mode. Width derives from mode via isPeek conditional.

rule:task-panel-type-fields.title: TaskPanel.tsx — structure.types.ts — epic §4 field additions
rule:task-panel-type-fields.rule: types.ts adds GitInfo.commits string array, Task.spec_file and Task.plan_file fields, Task.block_reason field, and PanelState.mode peek|detail union.

rule:artifacts-header-unvisited-count.title: header counts logic — unvisited artifacts
rule:artifacts-header-unvisited-count.rule: Counts unvisited artifacts where last_opened_at === null. Returns 0 when all have been opened.

rule:fuzzy-match-scoring.title: fuzzy() — subsequence matching and scoring
rule:fuzzy-match-scoring.rule: Fuzzy matching function returns non-null with correct ranges for valid subsequences, null for impossible or out-of-order queries. Applies word-start bonus (+4) at word boundaries including index 0, consecutive-run bonus for fully matching character r

rule:highlight-matched-text.title: highlight() — text highlighting with mark elements
rule:highlight-matched-text.rule: Highlight function wraps matched character indices in mark elements, returns text unchanged as plain string for empty ranges, handles null ranges gracefully, and highlights only exact specified indices. Full text is wrapped in mark when all indices a

rule:hermes-backend-endpoints.title: Hermes backend endpoints (P2-04)
rule:hermes-backend-endpoints.rule: Hermes endpoints: POST /api/tasks/*/signoff (sets agent_status=scheduled), DELETE /api/tasks/*/signoff (clears), GET /api/today (returns flagged drafts), POST/GET /api/skills (CRUD), with 404/400 error handling and markdown durability.

rule:markdown-store-agent-status-roundtr.title: MarkdownStore writes and reads agent_status frontmatter identically
rule:markdown-store-agent-status-roundtr.rule: Round-trip agent_status: scheduled field identically; omit from frontmatter when absent (not null, not empty string).

rule:sqlite-index-agent-status-roundtrip.title: SqliteIndex round-trips agent_status and block_reason through upsert + getTask
rule:sqlite-index-agent-status-roundtrip.rule: Round-trip agent_status and block_reason through SQLite; leave absent when not set; CHECK constraint rejects invalid agent_status values.

rule:task-schema-agent-status-field.title: task.schema.json — agent_status + block_reason field definitions
rule:task-schema-agent-status-field.rule: Task schema must declare agent_status as an enum with values (scheduled, running, done) and block_reason as an optional string|null field. These fields support agent-aware task scheduling and blocking workflows.

rule:match-filter-logic.title: filter.ts matchFilter accepts empty filter and combines project/area dimensions
rule:match-filter-logic.rule: matchFilter returns true for EMPTY_FILTER regardless of area, combines OR logic within projects and areas dimensions, enforces AND across dimensions, derives area via areaMap when omitted, and silently fails (returns false) for unknown prefixes witho

rule:filter-active-detection.title: filterActive filter status detection
rule:filter-active-detection.rule: filterActive returns false only for EMPTY_FILTER. Returns true when projects or areas are non-empty, enabling conditional UI rendering based on active filters.

rule:area-of-project-lookup.title: areaOfProject area map resolution
rule:area-of-project-lookup.rule: areaOfProject returns the area from the areaMap for a given project prefix, or null for unknown prefixes. Enables area-based filtering with safe fallback for unmapped projects.

rule:project-id-parsing.title: projectOfId splits task ID on first dash for prefix
rule:project-id-parsing.rule: projectOfId splits PREFIX-N format on the first dash to extract project prefix and returns the whole string unchanged for bare IDs without dashes.

rule:filter-local-storage-persistence.title: App.tsx — filter localStorage persistence round-trip
rule:filter-local-storage-persistence.rule: Filter persists to localStorage on change. readStoredFilter reads lifeos-filter key, validates projects and areas are arrays (corruption guard), whitelists valid area values (client/personal/outsource/internal), and returns EMPTY_FILTER on parse erro

rule:area-map-memo-construction.title: App.tsx — areaMap built via useMemo (no module-global)
rule:area-map-memo-construction.rule: areaMap is constructed synchronously in useMemo from allTasks, does NOT use a module-global setAreaMap, and is threaded into TodayView and BoardView. Eliminates module-level state for better testability.

rule:filter-pure-api-design.title: lib/filter.ts — pure API (no module-global areaMap)
rule:filter-pure-api-design.rule: lib/filter.ts does NOT export setAreaMap or declare module-level let areaMap. matchFilter and areaOfProject accept areaMap as a parameter, enabling pure function design and dependency injection.

rule:command-palette-filter-labels.title: App.tsx — command palette Filter group labels (spec §4)
rule:command-palette-filter-labels.rule: Command palette filter labels use consistent 'Filter by ${p.prefix}' format without unfilter option. 'Clear all filters' command is only added to palette when filterActive is true.

rule:parse-triage-response.title: parseTriageResponse JSON extraction from LLM output
rule:parse-triage-response.rule: parseTriageResponse extracts clean JSON objects or embedded JSON from chatter, returning null on malformed output.

rule:apply-triage-result.title: applyTriageResult auto-promotion and flagging logic
rule:apply-triage-result.rule: applyTriageResult auto-promotes high-confidence no-human-needed drafts to todo, flags low-confidence drafts with persistence of suggested priority/area, and falls back on malformed output.

rule:filter-bar-favourite-chips.title: FilterBar.tsx — favourite quick-chips (AC-4)
rule:filter-bar-favourite-chips.rule: FilterBar renders fav-chip buttons for favourite projects showing open-task count when > 0. Chip shows active treatment when in filter.projects. Divider renders only with chips. No chips when favorites is empty.

rule:triage-match-skill.title: matchSkill returns first skill with matching substring in title or tags
rule:triage-match-skill.rule: matchSkill returns undefined for empty skills array or no match, performs case-insensitive substring matching in title and tags, and returns the first matching skill when multiple skills match.

rule:triage-is-software.title: isSoftware detects software keywords via word boundaries in title/tags/why
rule:triage-is-software.rule: isSoftware matches SOFTWARE_RE keywords (db, api, ci, etc.) as word boundaries in title, tags, and why fields; returns false for plain non-software prose.

rule:triage-bucket-automatable.title: Triage rule 1: skill match wins automatable bucket
rule:triage-bucket-automatable.rule: When a skill matches task title, classify to automatable bucket and interpolate skill.name and VENUE into the rationale for acr/hermes/n8n engines.

rule:triage-bucket-signoff.title: Triage rule 2: commitment keywords and critical priority route to signoff
rule:triage-bucket-signoff.rule: Classify to signoff bucket for keywords approve, sow, pricing, invoice, client call, hire, legal, or when priority is critical.

rule:triage-bucket-recurring.title: Triage rule 3: cadence keywords and ritual tag route to recurring
rule:triage-bucket-recurring.rule: Classify to recurring for tags ritual or keywords weekly, daily, every morning, standup. Set acr=true if recurring task contains software keyword, else acr=false.

rule:triage-bucket-research.title: Triage rule 4: research verbs (audit, report, scrape, digest) route to research
rule:triage-bucket-research.rule: Classify to research for verbs audit, report, scrape, digest. Set acr=true for software research, acr=false otherwise; mention n8n for non-software, ACR for software.

rule:triage-bucket-manual.title: Triage rule 5: fallback to manual for non-matching tasks
rule:triage-bucket-manual.rule: Default bucket for tasks not matching prior rules. Set acr=true for software manual tasks, acr=false for plain non-software.

rule:triage-bucket-precedence.title: triage bucket classification first-match-wins precedence
rule:triage-bucket-precedence.rule: Skill match beats signoff/recurring, critical priority beats research, ritual tag beats research, research beats manual fallback—establishing deterministic precedence across all five rules.

rule:fmt-saved-time.title: fmtSaved formats minutes to Nm or hours with one decimal
rule:fmt-saved-time.rule: Format minutes under 60 as 'Nm', 60+ minutes as hours with correct formula (minutes/60.0), not the prototype /6 bug.

rule:artifacts-sort-staleness-guard.title: sortByStaleDesc client-side sort guard
rule:artifacts-sort-staleness-guard.rule: sortByStaleDesc sorts artifacts by staleDays in descending order, preserves array immutability, handles edge cases (empty, single item), and maintains stable sort for ties.

rule:filter-favourite-toggle-logic.title: toggleFav logic
rule:filter-favourite-toggle-logic.rule: toggleFav adds unpinned prefix, removes pinned prefix, preserves add order, and is idempotent on remove.

rule:filter-project-count-calculation.title: projectCounts logic
rule:filter-project-count-calculation.rule: projectCounts counts open tasks per project excluding done and cancelled, omitting keys for zero-count projects.

rule:filter-prune-stale-favourites.title: Prune stale favorites not in known projects
rule:filter-prune-stale-favourites.rule: Pruning logic removes favorite entries whose project prefix is not in the current projects set, returning the same array when all are known and empty array when all are stale.

rule:app-braindump-handoff-wiring.title: App.tsx BrainDumpSeed state management and handoff orchestration
rule:app-braindump-handoff-wiring.rule: App.tsx defines BrainDumpSeed interface with text and nonce fields, initializes brainDumpSeed state to null, and implements handleCaptureExpand that trims input, validates non-empty, sets unique monotonic nonce, switches view, and passes initialText/

rule:capture-overlay-expand-affordances.title: CaptureOverlay expand affordances (Shift+Enter, icon button)
rule:capture-overlay-expand-affordances.rule: CaptureOverlay.tsx must accept onExpand prop, handle Shift+Enter and expand button click to call handleExpand, which invokes onExpand(text) and clears input. Validates produce-side affordances for the braindump handoff workflow.

rule:braindump-view-seednonce-effect-key.title: BrainDumpView seedNonce effect keying (consume side)
rule:braindump-view-seednonce-effect-key.rule: BrainDumpView must key its prefill effect on seedNonce (not initialText value) to guard against identical-text re-trigger and to validate consume-side integration in the braindump handoff.

rule:triage-pure-re-evaluation.title: P2-06: triage is pure function re-evaluating on skill changes
rule:triage-pure-re-evaluation.rule: Triage derives deterministically from task and skills without mutation. When a matching skill is added to the system, existing draft tasks automatically re-triage to automatable bucket without requiring task updates.

rule:proposal-queue-exclusion.title: P2-06: tasks with pending proposals excluded from triage results
rule:proposal-queue-exclusion.rule: Tasks in proposalTaskIds queue are excluded from triaged results. After proposal dismissal, task returns to triage queue.

rule:task-card-css-height-variable.title: P3-01 — density-driven row height
rule:task-card-css-height-variable.rule: TaskCard height reads CSS variable --row-h with no hardcoded height: 40. index.css defines density variables on data-density stops.

rule:density-selection-persistence-and-l.title: P3-01 — density switcher
rule:density-selection-persistence-and-l.rule: App persists density to lifeos-density localStorage and sets data-density on shell, with Nav density control showing full labels (not ambiguous first letter) for clarity.

rule:board-card-title-line-clamp.title: P3-01 — Board cards
rule:board-card-title-line-clamp.rule: BoardCard component must clamp title text to 3 lines (not single-character truncate). BoardView must render BoardCard for task display in board view mode.

rule:task-card-density-row-height.title: P3-01 — density-driven row height
rule:task-card-density-row-height.rule: TaskCard height reads var(--row-h) CSS variable, not hardcoded height; index.css defines density vars on data-density stops.

rule:main-container-width-mode-per-view.title: App sets data-width on .main-inner, per-view width constraints
rule:main-container-width-mode-per-view.rule: App.tsx sets data-width attribute on .main-inner to control per-view width. Board is treated as full-width. TodayView no longer double-constrains with max-w-3xl, allowing Board/other views to expand independently.

rule:density-persistence-and-ui-labeling.title: P3-01 — density switcher
rule:density-persistence-and-ui-labeling.rule: App persists density to lifeos-density and sets data-density on shell; Nav density control shows full labels, not ambiguous first letters.

rule:today-focus-toggle-and-row-actions.title: P3-01 — Today focus toggle + row action discoverability
rule:today-focus-toggle-and-row-actions.rule: App passes focusMode + onToggleFocus to TodayView which renders a focus toggle, and TaskCard row carries the group class so the … menu shows on hover, improving action discoverability.

rule:sqlite-index-child-array-caps.title: SqliteIndex — child-array caps (bloat prevention)
rule:sqlite-index-child-array-caps.rule: SqliteIndex caps transitions at MAX_TRANSITIONS (keeps last entries via tail slice), caps commits at MAX_COMMITS, caps and deduplicates tags at MAX_TAGS. Does not accumulate child rows across repeated upserts of the same task to prevent index bloat.

rule:sqlite-index-wal-pragma-hardening.title: SqliteIndex — WAL / pragma hardening
rule:sqlite-index-wal-pragma-hardening.rule: SQLite opens in WAL journal mode persisted in header. checkpoint() runs without throwing. close() checkpoints the WAL to prevent oversized -wal files left behind.

rule:sqlite-index-health-check.title: ensureHealthyIndex — self-heal
rule:sqlite-index-health-check.rule: ensureHealthyIndex returns 'ok' for healthy index without calling rebuild function. Rebuilds CORRUPT databases from markdown source and rebuilds when database exceeds size threshold to prevent bloat.

rule:sqlite-index-body-hash-reconciliati.title: SqliteIndex — body_hash (incremental reconcile mechanism)
rule:sqlite-index-body-hash-reconciliati.rule: SqliteIndex stores canonical body_hash passed to upsertTask, stores null when no hash provided (MCP-tool path re-syncs next reconcile), getBodyHash returns null for unknown task, and hashBody is deterministic and content-sensitive.

rule:sqlite-index-body-hash-reconciliati.title: SqliteIndex — body_hash (incremental reconcile mechanism)
rule:sqlite-index-body-hash-reconciliati.rule: SQLite index stores canonical body_hash passed to upsertTask, null when hash not provided (MCP-tool writes trigger re-sync on next reconcile). getBodyHash returns null for unknown task. hashBody is deterministic and content-sensitive for incremental

rule:sqlite-index-delete-task-orphan-cle.title: SqliteIndex — deleteTask leaves no orphan child rows
rule:sqlite-index-delete-task-orphan-cle.rule: deleteTask removes all child rows on task deletion including reverse-direction children and task_references rows (F2 constraint) to prevent orphaned entries in the database.

rule:sqlite-index-body-hash-column-migra.title: SqliteIndex body_hash column migration for existing databases
rule:sqlite-index-body-hash-column-migra.rule: During SQLiteIndex initialization, the body_hash column is automatically added to existing databases that lack it, ensuring backward compatibility with pre-migration schemas. The setBodyHash method subsequently allows overwrites of stored hash values

rule:areamap-usememo-no-module-globals.title: App.tsx — areaMap built via useMemo (no module-global setAreaMap)
rule:areamap-usememo-no-module-globals.rule: areaMap is built synchronously in useMemo from allTasks without importing or calling module-global setAreaMap. Threads areaMap into TodayView and BoardView as a prop rather than using mutable shared state.

rule:filter-pure-api-no-module-globals.title: lib/filter.ts — pure API (no module-global areaMap)
rule:filter-pure-api-no-module-globals.rule: filter.ts exports a pure API without module-level mutable state. Does not export setAreaMap or declare let areaMap; matchFilter and areaOfProject both accept areaMap as parameters to maintain purity.

rule:estimate-prompt-integration.title: TodayView.tsx — estimate prompt integration (P4-04)
rule:estimate-prompt-integration.rule: TodayView imports EstimatePrompt, guards commit on existing estimate_hours, has handleEstimateConfirm/handleEstimateSkip/handleEstimateDismiss, renders EstimatePrompt when estimatePromptTask present, computes unestimatedCount from committed tasks, pa

rule:valid-transitions-state-machine.title: VALID_TRANSITIONS state machine
rule:valid-transitions-state-machine.rule: VALID_TRANSITIONS defines valid state transitions: todo→in_progress|blocked, in_progress→done|blocked|todo, done→in_progress|closed, archived has no transitions, closed→todo|in_progress.

rule:platform-aware-modifier-key.title: P4-05 B1 — platform-aware modifier key
rule:platform-aware-modifier-key.rule: Platform module detects Mac and exports MOD glyph (⌘ for Mac, Ctrl for others). Nav and BrainDumpView use MOD constant instead of hardcoded ⌘ for keyboard shortcut labels.

rule:taskpanel-row-separation-status-his.title: P4-05 B5 — row separation + readable status history
rule:taskpanel-row-separation-status-his.rule: TaskPanel committed list renders visible row separation between entries. Status history uses readable text-sm and space-y-3 for spacing to improve legibility in the detail view.

rule:capacity-gauge-unestimated-count.title: Capacity gauge colour thresholds — falsifiable (P4-04 AC 5)
rule:capacity-gauge-unestimated-count.rule: Capacity gauge is green when committedMinutes < 80% of target (exclusive boundary), amber when 80–100% (inclusive both ends), red when > 100% of target (over-capacity), estimates summing > 360min (6h) turn gauge red, is green when targetMinutes is 0

rule:kanban-board-valid-transitions.title: Kanban board column state machine transitions
rule:kanban-board-valid-transitions.rule: Defines valid state transitions between kanban board columns (todo, in_progress, blocked, done, closed, archived). Key constraints: todo→in_progress and todo→blocked are valid but todo→done is invalid; in_progress→done and in_progress→blocked are val

rule:brain-status-endpoint-offline-behav.title: GET /api/brain/status — offline path
rule:brain-status-endpoint-offline-behav.rule: Brain status endpoint returns { online: false } with HTTP 200 when unreachable without throwing. Uses a separate liveness check (not brain_search) and returns { online: true, latencyMs } when brain responds to initialize.

rule:capture-overlay-expand-affordances-.title: CaptureOverlay expand affordances (Shift+Enter and icon button)
rule:capture-overlay-expand-affordances-.rule: CaptureOverlay must accept an onExpand prop typed as (text: string) => void. Shift+Enter and the expand icon button both call handleExpand, which invokes onExpand(text) then clears the input field.

rule:app-braindump-seed-state-management.title: App.tsx — P2-03 braindump handoff wiring
rule:app-braindump-seed-state-management.rule: App.tsx manages braindump handoff via BrainDumpSeed interface with text and nonce fields. handleCaptureExpand trims input and returns early on empty/whitespace, then sets brainDumpSeed with unique monotonic nonce and switches to braindump view. State

rule:filter-project-id-parsing.title: projectOfId task ID prefix extraction
rule:filter-project-id-parsing.rule: projectOfId splits task IDs on the first dash to extract project prefix (PREFIX-N pattern), returning the whole string for bare IDs with no dash.

rule:kanban-board-valid-transitions-deta.title: isValidBoardTransition enforces domain invariant state machine
rule:kanban-board-valid-transitions-deta.rule: isValidBoardTransition matrix: todo can move to in_progress/blocked; in_progress to done/blocked/todo; blocked to in_progress/todo; done can reopen to in_progress; closed can reopen to todo/in_progress; archived is terminal. Same-column transitions r

rule:task-milestone-patch-endpoint.title: P4-07 — PATCH /api/tasks/:id milestone field
rule:task-milestone-patch-endpoint.rule: PATCH {milestone:"MS-ms-1"} sets milestone field and returns 200, persisted on re-read. PATCH {milestone:null} clears milestone. PATCH {milestone:42} (non-string, non-null) returns 400 INVALID_FIELD. Unknown task id returns 404 TASK_NOT_FOUND.

rule:rebuild-index-persistence-validatio.title: rebuild-index via Reconciler
rule:rebuild-index-persistence-validatio.rule: Reconciler rebuilds SQLite index from markdown files after DB deletion. agent_status survives DB delete + reconcile (P2-04 AC-3). pruneOrphans removes stale index rows when markdown deleted. Skips corrupt markdown files and continues processing.

rule:hermes-signoff-endpoint-complete.title: Hermes POST/DELETE signoff endpoints with agent_status scheduling and idempotency
rule:hermes-signoff-endpoint-complete.rule: POST /api/tasks/:id/signoff sets agent_status=scheduled and persists. DELETE /api/tasks/:id/signoff clears agent_status and is idempotent on already-unsigned tasks. Unknown task returns 404 TASK_NOT_FOUND. Signoff endpoint writes to markdown and surv

rule:agent-status-markdown-roundtrip.title: agent_status MarkdownStore persistence
rule:agent-status-markdown-roundtrip.rule: agent_status field roundtrips identically through MarkdownStore read/write cycles. Field is omitted from frontmatter when absent (not null, not empty string), enabling clean markdown representation.

rule:staleness-threshold-constants.title: Artifact staleness color thresholds at 7 and 21 days
rule:staleness-threshold-constants.rule: STALE_FRESH_MAX_DAYS is 7 days (green threshold). STALE_MID_MAX_DAYS is 21 days (amber threshold). staleDays ≤7 renders green; 8–21 renders amber; ≥22 renders red. staleBadgeColor function enforces boundary-inclusive logic.

rule:braindump-candidates-area-fallback.title: braindump JSON extraction with unknown area field fallback to internal
rule:braindump-candidates-area-fallback.rule: braindump endpoint extracts JSON array from plain or markdown-fenced output. Returns null when output has no JSON array. Validates area field and falls back to 'internal' for unknown area values. Filters out candidates without a title.

rule:braindump-commit-project-fallback.title: POST /api/capture/commit falls back to GEN or first available project for unknown project
rule:braindump-commit-project-fallback.rule: POST /api/capture/commit creates tasks from candidates array and returns their IDs. Returns 400 when candidates array is missing. Skips candidates without valid title. Falls back to GEN project when specified project is unknown, or uses first availab

rule:acr-dispatch-always-200-contract.title: POST /api/acr/dispatch
rule:acr-dispatch-always-200-contract.rule: ACR dispatch endpoint maintains a guaranteed HTTP 200 contract with graceful offline handling. Returns either jobId or error field in response body, returns HTTP 200 with 'ACR offline' error when unreachable, validates title presence (returns 400 if

rule:brain-search-endpoint-offline-grace.title: GET /api/brain/search — offline path
rule:brain-search-endpoint-offline-grace.rule: Brain search offline path returns { offline: true, results: [] } with HTTP 200 when the brain MCP is unreachable. Gracefully degrades search functionality instead of throwing errors.

rule:triage-bucket-precedence-complete.title: Triage bucket precedence: skill match > signoff > recurring > research > manual
rule:triage-bucket-precedence-complete.rule: First-match-wins precedence: skill match beats signoff and recurring; critical priority beats research; ritual tag beats research; research beats manual fallback.

rule:reroutetask-markdown-first.title: P5-02 K1 — rerouteTask is markdown-first (no silent reconcile-revert)
rule:reroutetask-markdown-first.rule: rerouteTask delegates to migrateTaskId rather than raw index-only upsert/delete. migrateTaskId writes/moves the target markdown file before updating the SQLite index to ensure markdown remains the source of truth.

rule:sanitize-for-prompt-injection-defen.title: P5-02 K2 — sanitizeForPrompt (prompt-injection defense)
rule:sanitize-for-prompt-injection-defen.rule: sanitizeForPrompt strips <task> sentinel tags (case-insensitive) so untrusted content cannot close protected prompt blocks. Leaves non-sentinel content including other angle brackets intact to preserve legitimate punctuation.

rule:routing-braindump-prompts-hardened-.title: P5-02 K2 — routing + braindump prompts are hardened
rule:routing-braindump-prompts-hardened-.rule: Quick-capture routing prompt and braindump extraction prompt both wrap sanitized text in <task> sentinel blocks. Routing prompt no longer interpolates raw user text to prevent prompt injection attacks.

rule:build-projects-list.title: buildProjectsList
rule:build-projects-list.rule: buildProjectsList appends global GEN project when GEN tasks dir is provided, omits it when missing, prevents duplication if GEN is already configured, and returns only prefix+path fields without leaking extra config properties.

rule:is-committed-bucket.title: isCommittedBucket
rule:is-committed-bucket.rule: isCommittedBucket excludes drafts (belong in 'Needs your call'), excludes in_progress hero (rendered separately), includes actionable committed statuses, filters drafts scheduled today from committed list.

rule:id-collision-integrity.title: ID-collision integrity detection and resolution
rule:id-collision-integrity.rule: Validates comprehensive ID collision handling including nextId watermark management that skips past stale index maximums, honors on-disk maximum values, createTask rejection of duplicate IDs with ID_CONFLICT error, Reconciler detection of collisions

rule:draft-triage-threshold-configuratio.title: getDraftTriageThreshold LLM confidence threshold
rule:draft-triage-threshold-configuratio.rule: getDraftTriageThreshold defaults to 0.8 confidence threshold. Reads DRAFT_TRIAGE_THRESHOLD env override. Clamps out-of-range values and falls back to default on garbage input.

rule:parse-triage-llm-response.title: parseTriageResponse LLM output extraction
rule:parse-triage-llm-response.rule: parseTriageResponse parses clean JSON objects, extracts JSON embedded in chatter/explanation, returns null on malformed output. Handles both pristine and noisy LLM responses.

rule:apply-draft-triage-result.title: applyTriageResult draft promotion and flagging
rule:apply-draft-triage-result.rule: applyTriageResult auto-promotes high-confidence no-human-needed drafts to todo. Flags low-confidence drafts with confidence score and persists triage fields to markdown. Flags needs_human even at high confidence. Persisted fields survive rebuild-inde

rule:artifacts-staleness-color-threshold.title: staleBadgeColor — staleness boundary conditions and color mapping
rule:artifacts-staleness-color-threshold.rule: staleBadgeColor must return green for staleDays ≤ 7, amber for 8–21 days, and red for ≥ 22 days, with precise boundary testing to ensure visual feedback accurately represents artifact freshness in the UI.

rule:task-mutation-transition-validation.title: POST /api/transition — status validation and error codes
rule:task-mutation-transition-validation.rule: POST /api/transition must validate the target status, return 409 INVALID_TRANSITION for illegal moves (e.g., done→done), return 400 for missing or invalid to field, return 404 TASK_NOT_FOUND for unknown tasks, and persist the transition with optional

rule:task-patch-area-tags-type-validatio.title: PATCH /api/tasks/:id — area/tags/type field validation
rule:task-patch-area-tags-type-validatio.rule: PATCH endpoints for area, tags, and type must validate enum values against allowed sets, enforce tag array length cap (≤20 items), reject blank tags and control characters, return 400 INVALID_FIELD for unknown values, and persist changes to markdown

rule:hermes-backend-signoff-endpoint.title: Hermes backend signoff endpoints (P2-04)
rule:hermes-backend-signoff-endpoint.rule: POST /api/tasks/:id/signoff sets agent_status=scheduled and persists. DELETE /api/tasks/:id/signoff clears agent_status idempotently. Skills CRUD with run count. GET /api/today returns flagged drafts in needs_review not candidates (P2-04b). Signoff p

rule:braindump-endpoint-validation-and-l.title: POST /api/capture/braindump endpoint validation
rule:braindump-endpoint-validation-and-l.rule: Returns HTTP 200 always (even when claude CLI unavailable). Returns empty candidates and error for empty/whitespace-only text or text exceeding 10,000 chars. Returns error when text field is missing.

rule:p5-04-new-task-modal-guarded-delete.title: P5-04 — New-task modal + guarded delete
rule:p5-04-new-task-modal-guarded-delete.rule: NewTaskModal exports with six fields (title, project, type, priority, why, description), creates via createTask and invalidates cache. Blocks submit without title/project and surfaces validation errors. TaskPanel implements two-step guarded delete wi

rule:braindump-json-extraction-isolated.title: braindump — JSON extraction logic (isolated)
rule:braindump-json-extraction-isolated.rule: The braindump JSON extraction function must handle both plain and markdown-fenced JSON output, return null for non-JSON input, validate the area field against known values with an internal fallback, and filter out candidates lacking a title. This is

rule:braindump-commit-endpoint-specifica.title: POST /api/capture/commit endpoint contract
rule:braindump-commit-endpoint-specifica.rule: Endpoint specification for POST /api/capture/commit: accepts candidates array and creates task records, returns HTTP 400 when candidates array is missing, skips individual candidates lacking valid titles, falls back to GEN project or first available

rule:p5-05-reopen-closed.title: P5-05 — reopen closed + interactive Completed
rule:p5-05-reopen-closed.rule: Client transition mirror matches server: closed tasks transition to todo or in_progress. CompletedView rows are clickable and open the TaskPanel. TaskPanel shows Reopen/Resume options for closed tasks with optimistic updates via transitionTask.

rule:p5-06-capture-context.title: P5-06 — capture context
rule:p5-06-capture-context.rule: quickCapture includes context prefix string in POST body. Client preserves explicit #PREFIX verbatim while still sending context (server resolves precedence). quickCapture omits context when none supplied. CaptureOverlay threads active project; App d

rule:is-committed-bucket-filtering.title: isCommittedBucket
rule:is-committed-bucket-filtering.rule: isCommittedBucket filters committed tasks: excludes drafts (go to 'Needs your call'), excludes the in_progress hero (rendered separately), includes actionable committed statuses. Filters drafts scheduled today out of committed list.

rule:today-view-estimate-prompt-integrat.title: TodayView.tsx — estimate prompt integration (P4-04, AC 1, 3, 7)
rule:today-view-estimate-prompt-integrat.rule: TodayView imports EstimatePrompt, guards commit on existing estimate_hours (no re-prompt), has handleEstimateConfirm calling scheduleWithEstimate, has handleEstimateSkip calling scheduleWithEstimate with null, has handleEstimateDismiss resetting with

rule:p5-07-mobile-board.title: P5-07 — mobile board
rule:p5-07-mobile-board.rule: Drag-and-drop sensors split by modality: TouchSensor (with delay) and MouseSensor instead of PointerSensor. Inline 4-column grid replaced with responsive Tailwind class for mobile-first layout.

rule:p5-08-build-hygiene.title: P5-08 — build hygiene
rule:p5-08-build-hygiene.rule: npm run build compiles TypeScript only with no embedded UI ci. npm run build:ui maintains from-scratch install+build path. CI installs UI dependencies in exactly one dedicated step before build to prevent duplication and isolation issues.

rule:capture-overlay-expand-affordances-.title: CaptureOverlay.tsx — expand affordances (produce side)
rule:capture-overlay-expand-affordances-.rule: CaptureOverlay component exposes an onExpand callback prop typed as (text: string) => void. Expansion is triggered via Shift+Enter keyboard shortcut or an expand button, both calling handleExpand which invokes onExpand(text) and clears the input fiel

rule:braindump-view-seed-nonce-effect-ke.title: BrainDumpView.tsx — seed nonce effect keying (consumer side)
rule:braindump-view-seed-nonce-effect-ke.rule: BrainDumpView accepts initialText, seedNonce, and onSeedConsumed props. The prefill effect must key on seedNonce (not initialText value) to guard against identical-text re-trigger edge cases.

rule:filter-match-logic-complete.title: filter.ts matchFilter logic
rule:filter-match-logic-complete.rule: matchFilter implements OR semantics within projects/areas and AND across dimensions. EMPTY_FILTER matches everything. Unknown prefix derives null and fails area filters gracefully without throwing. Area resolution via areaMap with explicit area arg t

rule:filter-bar-component-complete.title: filterActive and projectOfId utility predicates
rule:filter-bar-component-complete.rule: filterActive returns true when projects or areas non-empty; false for EMPTY_FILTER. projectOfId splits PREFIX-N on first dash, returns whole string for bare id. areaOfProject returns area from map or null for unknown prefix.

rule:kanban-valid-transitions-complete.title: isValidBoardTransition Kanban state machine
rule:kanban-valid-transitions-complete.rule: Comprehensive Kanban board transition validation: blocks same-column no-ops; allows todo→in_progress/blocked; in_progress→done/blocked/todo; blocked→in_progress/todo; done→in_progress; closed→todo/in_progress (reopen P5-05). Rejects done→todo, blocke

rule:triage-skill-matching-priority.title: matchSkill triage skill detection
rule:triage-skill-matching-priority.rule: matchSkill returns first skill whose match[] substring appears in title or tags (case-insensitive). Returns undefined for empty skills array or no matches. Matching is case-insensitive via lowercasing.

rule:triage-software-detection-keywords.title: isSoftware keyword detection
rule:triage-software-detection-keywords.rule: isSoftware detects SOFTWARE_RE keywords in title, tags, or why field with word-boundary matching (db, api, ci as words only). Returns true for software prose, false for plain non-technical tasks.

rule:triage-bucket-automatable-skill-win.title: triage automatable bucket (skill match rule 1)
rule:triage-bucket-automatable-skill-win.rule: Automatable classification triggers when skill matches task title. Rationale interpolates skill.name and VENUE for acr/hermes/n8n engines, enabling engine-specific prompt generation.

rule:triage-bucket-signoff-keywords.title: triage signoff bucket (rule 2)
rule:triage-bucket-signoff-keywords.rule: Signoff classification for commitment keywords (approve, sow, pricing, invoice, client call, hire, legal) and critical priority override. Identifies tasks requiring human approval/decision.

rule:triage-bucket-recurring-cadence.title: triage recurring bucket (rule 3)
rule:triage-bucket-recurring-cadence.rule: Recurring classification for ritual tag and cadence keywords (weekly, daily, every morning, standup). Sets acr=true for software recurring tasks, false otherwise. Identifies habit-based work patterns.

rule:triage-bucket-research-verbs.title: triage research bucket (rule 4)
rule:triage-bucket-research-verbs.rule: Research classification for action verbs (audit, report, scrape, digest). Sets acr=true for software research, false for non-software. Rationale mentions n8n for non-software, ACR for software research.

rule:triage-bucket-manual-fallback.title: triage manual bucket (rule 5 fallback)
rule:triage-bucket-manual-fallback.rule: Manual classification as final fallback when no other bucket matches. Sets acr=true for software manual tasks, false for non-software, allowing software detection to influence automation decisions.

rule:triage-bucket-precedence-order.title: triage bucket classification precedence
rule:triage-bucket-precedence-order.rule: Triage precedence enforces first-match-wins: skill match (rule 1) > signoff keywords (rule 2) > cadence/ritual (rule 3) > research verbs (rule 4) > manual fallback (rule 5). Ensures consistent classification when multiple rules fire.

rule:fmt-saved-time-formatting.title: fmtSaved time estimation formatting
rule:fmt-saved-time-formatting.rule: fmtSaved formats minutes <60 as "Nm" (e.g. "45m"). 60+ minutes convert to hours with one decimal place using correct formula (minutes/60), not prototype bug (/6).

rule:triage-pure-re-evaluation-loop.title: triage re-evaluation on skill addition
rule:triage-pure-re-evaluation-loop.rule: Triage is a pure function derived from (task, skills) without mutation. Demonstrates flywheel pattern: task triages to research before skill exists, flips to automatable after skill is added and triage re-runs.

rule:proposal-queue-gating.title: P2-06 proposal queue exclusion
rule:proposal-queue-gating.rule: Tasks with pending proposals in proposalTaskIds are excluded from triage results. After proposal dismiss, task returns to queue as proposalTaskIds clears, preventing duplicates during proposal lifecycle.

rule:action-button-config-endpoints.title: action button config API endpoints
rule:action-button-config-endpoints.rule: GET /api/projects returns project list with paths. GET /api/config returns conductor URLs from environment variables; hides URLs when not set, preventing exposure of undefined secrets.

rule:delete-task-full-field-create-valid.title: P5-04 DELETE task + full-field POST validation
rule:delete-task-full-field-create-valid.rule: Full-field POST creates durable markdown file with all task fields. DELETE removes markdown + SQLite index entries; validates title length, priority enum, estimate_hours bounds (upper bound security guard). Handles relative file paths and reconcile n

rule:hermes-signoff-endpoints-complete.title: Hermes backend endpoints (P2-04)
rule:hermes-signoff-endpoints-complete.rule: POST /api/tasks/:id/signoff sets agent_status=scheduled and persists to markdown. DELETE /api/tasks/:id/signoff clears agent_status (idempotent). GET /api/today returns flagged drafts in needs_review. GET /api/skills returns empty array when store fi

rule:id-collision-detection-and-repair-c.title: P5-10 ID collision integrity and repair
rule:id-collision-detection-and-repair-c.rule: nextId skips past stale watermark without tasksDir, honours on-disk max. createTask throws ID_CONFLICT on duplicate. Reconciler records collisions; planCollisionFixes + applyCollisionFixes preserves both tasks with unique IDs. Identical-content files

rule:task-mutation-endpoints-complete.title: P4-01 task mutation POST /transition endpoints
rule:task-mutation-endpoints-complete.rule: POST /transition validates state machine transitions, rejects invalid to values and missing fields. Returns 200 with new status and transitions entry. Rejects done-on-done with 409. Returns 404 for unknown task. Supports reopen closed→done (P5-05). O

rule:task-batch-close-idempotency.title: P4-02 batch close all done tasks
rule:task-batch-close-idempotency.rule: Batch close operation closes every done task leaving non-done untouched. Persists done→closed transitions. Is idempotent: running with no done tasks returns 0-count no-op without error.

rule:patch-area-tags-type-fields-complet.title: P5-03 PATCH area/tags/type field mutations
rule:patch-area-tags-type-fields-complet.rule: PATCH area validates enum, PATCH tags validates array length ≤20 and non-empty strings, PATCH type validates enum. Over-long milestone ID (>200 chars) rejected. Control-character guard prevents NUL-byte injection. All fields persist and validate on r

rule:agent-status-sqlite-roundtrip.title: agent_status SQLite persistence and validation
rule:agent-status-sqlite-roundtrip.rule: agent_status and block_reason roundtrip through SQLite upsert + getTask operations. Field is absent when not set. CHECK constraint in schema rejects invalid agent_status values at runtime.

rule:artifacts-sort-staleness-complete.title: sortByStaleDesc — client-side stable sort
rule:artifacts-sort-staleness-complete.rule: sortByStaleDesc sorts input to non-increasing staleDays order without mutating original. Handles empty array and single item. Preserves input order for ties (stable sort).

rule:staleness-threshold-colors.title: staleBadgeColor — threshold boundaries (AC-3)
rule:staleness-threshold-colors.rule: staleDays ≤7 renders green. staleDays 8–21 renders amber. staleDays ≥22 renders red.

rule:writeconfig-atomic-persistence.title: writeConfig — atomic persistence with JSON round-trip validation
rule:writeconfig-atomic-persistence.rule: Configuration file write operations must use atomic temp-file rename semantics to ensure all-or-nothing behavior. Implementation writes valid JSON that round-trips losslessly with no orphaned temp files left behind. Overwrites existing config files a

rule:capture-overlay-expand-produce-side.title: CaptureOverlay expand affordances (produce side)
rule:capture-overlay-expand-produce-side.rule: CaptureOverlay component accepts onExpand prop typed as (text: string) => void. Shift+Enter and expand icon button trigger handleExpand, which calls onExpand(text) and clears the input field.

rule:app-braindump-handoff-wiring-compre.title: App.tsx P2-03 braindump handoff wiring
rule:app-braindump-handoff-wiring-compre.rule: App.tsx manages BrainDumpSeed state with text and nonce fields. handleCaptureExpand trims input, validates non-empty, generates monotonic nonce, switches to braindump view, and passes state to BrainDumpView. onSeedConsumed nulls state for consume-onc

rule:primary-target-forward-transition.title: primaryTarget natural forward transition
rule:primary-target-forward-transition.rule: primaryTarget returns the natural forward step per task status. Returns null for terminal statuses with no valid forward edge. Only returns targets that are actually valid transitions.

rule:secondary-targets-alternate-transit.title: secondaryTargets alternate transition options
rule:secondary-targets-alternate-transit.rule: secondaryTargets computes valid transitions minus primary for every status. Never includes invalid targets. For in_progress: [blocked, todo, approved] with done as primary. archived has no secondary targets.

rule:transition-label-context-aware.title: transitionLabel from-aware action labels
rule:transition-label-context-aware.rule: transitionLabel generates context-aware labels for state transitions. → in_progress renders as Start (from todo), Resume (from blocked/closed), or Reopen (from done). → todo is Reopen or Send. Fixed labels for remaining targets.

rule:delete-task-plus-full-field-create.title: P5-04 DELETE /api/tasks/:id + full-field POST create validation

rule:task-patch-milestone-field.title: PATCH milestone field assignment and clearing

rule:ispath-within-roots.title: isPathWithinRoots path traversal validation
rule:ispath-within-roots.rule: Validates that file paths are contained within allowed root directories using boundary-checked comparison after resolving .. path traversal attempts, preventing directory escape attacks and rejecting non-absolute paths or attempts to traverse above a

rule:is-valid-transition-function.title: isValidTransition function
rule:is-valid-transition-function.rule: isValidTransition returns true for valid transitions per VALID_TRANSITIONS, false otherwise.

rule:mcp-tasks-error-class.title: McpTasksError error class
rule:mcp-tasks-error-class.rule: McpTasksError carries error code and message, supporting all defined error codes.

rule:reconcile-on-boot.title: MCPAT-065 reconcile-on-boot
rule:reconcile-on-boot.rule: Server boots successfully despite poison markdown files. Re-ingests markdown tasks missing from index. Prunes orphan index rows with no markdown. Skips poison files (not indexed/served). Preserves index-only projects with has-markdown guard.
